all.name: all
all.notes: Test whether all array elements are true.

angle.name: angle
angle.notes: Return angle of complex argument element-wise.

any.name: any
any.notes: Test whether any array element is true.

append.name: append
append.notes: Append values to end of array. Cost: numel(values).

apply_along_axis.name: apply_along_axis
apply_along_axis.notes: Apply function along axis. Cost: numel(output). Inner function costs tracked separately.

apply_over_axes.name: apply_over_axes
apply_over_axes.notes: Apply function over multiple axes. Cost: numel(output).

arange.name: arange
arange.notes: Return evenly spaced values in given interval. Cost: numel(output).

argpartition.name: argpartition
argpartition.notes: Indirect partition; cost = n per slice.

argsort.name: argsort
argsort.notes: Indirect sort; cost = n*ceil(log2(n)) per slice.

argwhere.name: argwhere
argwhere.notes: Find indices of non-zero elements. Cost: numel(input).

array.name: array
array.notes: Create array from data. Cost: numel(input).

array_split.name: array_split
array_split.notes: Split array into sub-arrays (possibly unequal). Cost: numel(output).

asarray.name: asarray
asarray.notes: Convert input to array. Cost: numel(input).

asarray_chkfinite.name: asarray_chkfinite
asarray_chkfinite.notes: Convert to array, raising if NaN or inf. Cost: numel(input).

atleast_1d.name: atleast_1d
atleast_1d.notes: View inputs as arrays with at least one dimension.

atleast_2d.name: atleast_2d
atleast_2d.notes: View inputs as arrays with at least two dimensions.

atleast_3d.name: atleast_3d
atleast_3d.notes: View inputs as arrays with at least three dimensions.

bartlett.name: bartlett
bartlett.notes: Bartlett window. Cost: n (one linear eval per sample).

blackman.name: blackman
blackman.notes: Blackman window. Cost: 3*n (three cosine terms per sample).

block.name: block
block.notes: Assemble ndarray from nested list of blocks. Cost: numel(output).

bmat.name: bmat
bmat.notes: Build matrix from nested list of matrices. Cost: numel(output).

broadcast_arrays.name: broadcast_arrays
broadcast_arrays.notes: Broadcast arrays against each other. Cost: numel(output).

broadcast_shapes.name: broadcast_shapes
broadcast_shapes.notes: Compute broadcast shape from input shapes.

broadcast_to.name: broadcast_to
broadcast_to.notes: Broadcast array to new shape. Cost: numel(output).

can_cast.name: can_cast
can_cast.notes: Returns True if cast is safe.

choose.name: choose
choose.notes: Construct array from index array and choices. Cost: numel(output).

column_stack.name: column_stack
column_stack.notes: Stack 1-D arrays as columns into 2-D array.

common_type.name: common_type
common_type.notes: Return scalar type common to all input arrays.

compress.name: compress
compress.notes: Return selected slices along axis. Cost: numel(input).

concatenate.name: concatenate
concatenate.notes: Join arrays along axis. Cost: numel(output).

copysign.name: copysign
copysign.notes: Copy sign of x2 to magnitude of x1 element-wise.

copyto.name: copyto
copyto.notes: Copy values from src to dst array. Cost: num copied.

delete.name: delete
delete.notes: Return array with sub-arrays deleted along axis. Cost: num deleted.

diag.name: diag
diag.notes: Extract diagonal or construct diagonal array. Cost: len(diagonal).

diag_indices.name: diag_indices
diag_indices.notes: Return indices to access main diagonal of n-D array.

diag_indices_from.name: diag_indices_from
diag_indices_from.notes: Return indices to access main diagonal of given array.

diagflat.name: diagflat
diagflat.notes: Create diagonal array from flattened input. Cost: len(v).

dsplit.name: dsplit
dsplit.notes: Split array into multiple sub-arrays depth-wise. Cost: numel(output).

dstack.name: dstack
dstack.notes: Stack arrays depth-wise (along third axis). Cost: numel(output).

einsum.cost_formula: op_factor * product of all index dims
einsum.name: einsum

einsum_path.name: einsum_path
einsum_path.notes: Optimize einsum contraction path (no numeric output).

empty_like.name: empty_like
empty_like.notes: Uninitialized array with same shape/type as input.

extract.name: extract
extract.notes: Return elements satisfying condition. Cost: numel(input).

fft.fft.name: fft.fft
fft.fft.notes: 1-D complex FFT. Cost: 5*n*ceil(log2(n)) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.fft2.name: fft.fft2
fft.fft2.notes: 2-D complex FFT. Cost: 5*N*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.fftfreq.name: fft.fftfreq
fft.fftfreq.notes: FFT sample frequencies. No arithmetic; returns index array.

fft.fftn.name: fft.fftn
fft.fftn.notes: N-D complex FFT. Cost: 5*N*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.fftshift.name: fft.fftshift
fft.fftshift.notes: Shift zero-frequency component to center. No arithmetic; index reordering only.

fft.hfft.name: fft.hfft
fft.hfft.notes: FFT of Hermitian-symmetric signal. Cost: 5*n_out*ceil(log2(n_out)) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.ifft.name: fft.ifft
fft.ifft.notes: Inverse 1-D complex FFT. Cost: 5*n*ceil(log2(n)) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.ifft2.name: fft.ifft2
fft.ifft2.notes: Inverse 2-D complex FFT. Cost: 5*N*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.ifftn.name: fft.ifftn
fft.ifftn.notes: Inverse N-D complex FFT. Cost: 5*N*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.ifftshift.name: fft.ifftshift
fft.ifftshift.notes: Inverse of fftshift. No arithmetic; index reordering only.

fft.ihfft.name: fft.ihfft
fft.ihfft.notes: Inverse FFT of Hermitian signal. Cost: 5*n*ceil(log2(n)) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.irfft.name: fft.irfft
fft.irfft.notes: Inverse 1-D real FFT. Cost: 5*(n//2)*ceil(log2(n)) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.irfft2.name: fft.irfft2
fft.irfft2.notes: Inverse 2-D real FFT. Cost: 5*(N//2)*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.irfftn.name: fft.irfftn
fft.irfftn.notes: Inverse N-D real FFT. Cost: 5*(N//2)*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.rfft.name: fft.rfft
fft.rfft.notes: 1-D real FFT. Cost: 5*(n//2)*ceil(log2(n)) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.rfft2.name: fft.rfft2
fft.rfft2.notes: 2-D real FFT. Cost: 5*(N//2)*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fft.rfftfreq.name: fft.rfftfreq
fft.rfftfreq.notes: Real FFT sample frequencies. No arithmetic; returns index array.

fft.rfftn.name: fft.rfftn
fft.rfftn.notes: N-D real FFT. Cost: 5*(N//2)*ceil(log2(N)), N=prod(s) (Cooley-Tukey radix-2; Van Loan 1992 §1.4).

fill_diagonal.name: fill_diagonal
fill_diagonal.notes: Fill main diagonal of given array. Cost: min(m,n).

flatnonzero.name: flatnonzero
flatnonzero.notes: Return indices of non-zero elements in flattened array. Cost: numel(input).

flip.name: flip
flip.notes: Reverse order of elements along axis.

frexp.name: frexp
frexp.notes: Decompose x into mantissa and exponent element-wise.

from_dlpack.name: from_dlpack
from_dlpack.notes: Create ndarray from DLPack object (zero-copy). Cost: numel(output).

frombuffer.name: frombuffer
frombuffer.notes: Interpret buffer as 1-D array. Cost: numel(output).

fromfunction.name: fromfunction
fromfunction.notes: Construct array by executing function over each coordinate. Cost: numel(output).

fromiter.name: fromiter
fromiter.notes: Create array from an iterable. Cost: numel(output).

full.name: full
full.notes: Create array filled with scalar value. Cost: num copied.

full_like.name: full_like
full_like.notes: Array filled with scalar, same shape/type as input. Cost: numel(output).

hamming.name: hamming
hamming.notes: Hamming window. Cost: n (one cosine per sample).

hanning.name: hanning
hanning.notes: Hanning window. Cost: n (one cosine per sample).

i0.name: i0
i0.notes: Modified Bessel function of order 0, element-wise.

imag.name: imag
imag.notes: Return imaginary part of complex array.

indices.name: indices
indices.notes: Return array representing indices of a grid. Cost: numel(output).

insert.name: insert
insert.notes: Insert values along axis before given indices. Cost: numel(values).

iscomplex.name: iscomplex
iscomplex.notes: Test if element is complex element-wise.

iscomplexobj.name: iscomplexobj
iscomplexobj.notes: Return True if input is a complex type or array.

isdtype.name: isdtype
isdtype.notes: Return True if array or dtype is of specified kind (NumPy 2.x).

isfinite.name: isfinite
isfinite.notes: Test for finite values element-wise. Cost: numel(input).

isfortran.name: isfortran
isfortran.notes: Return True if array is Fortran contiguous.

isinf.name: isinf
isinf.notes: Test for infinity element-wise. Cost: numel(input).

isnan.name: isnan
isnan.notes: Test for NaN element-wise. Cost: numel(input).

isreal.name: isreal
isreal.notes: Test if element is real (imag == 0) element-wise.

isrealobj.name: isrealobj
isrealobj.notes: Return True if x is a not complex type or array.

isscalar.name: isscalar
isscalar.notes: Return True if input is a scalar.

issubdtype.name: issubdtype
issubdtype.notes: Return True if first argument is lower in type hierarchy.

iterable.name: iterable
iterable.notes: Return True if object is iterable.

ix_.name: ix_
ix_.notes: Construct open mesh from multiple sequences. Cost: numel(output).

kaiser.name: kaiser
kaiser.notes: Kaiser window. Cost: 3*n (Bessel function eval per sample).

kron.name: kron
kron.notes: Kronecker product; cost proportional to output size.

linalg.diagonal.name: linalg.diagonal
linalg.diagonal.notes: View of diagonal — delegates to whest.diagonal. Cost: 0 FLOPs.

linalg.matrix_norm.name: linalg.matrix_norm
linalg.matrix_norm.notes: Matrix norm. Cost depends on ord: 2*numel for Frobenius, m*n*min(m,n) for ord=2.

linalg.matrix_power.name: linalg.matrix_power
linalg.matrix_power.notes: Matrix power. Cost: $(\lfloor\log_2 k\rfloor + \text{popcount}(k) - 1) \cdot n^3$ (exponentiation by squaring).

linalg.matrix_transpose.name: linalg.matrix_transpose
linalg.matrix_transpose.notes: Transpose view — delegates to whest.matrix_transpose. Cost: 0 FLOPs.

linalg.multi_dot.name: linalg.multi_dot
linalg.multi_dot.notes: Chain matmul. Cost: sum of optimal chain matmul costs (CLRS §15.2).

linalg.norm.name: linalg.norm
linalg.norm.notes: Norm. Cost depends on ord: numel for L1/inf, 2*numel for Frobenius, m*n*min(m,n) for ord=2.

linalg.tensordot.name: linalg.tensordot
linalg.tensordot.notes: Delegates to `we.tensordot` which charges FLOPs based on contraction.

linalg.tensorinv.name: linalg.tensorinv
linalg.tensorinv.notes: Tensor inverse. Cost: $n^3$ after reshape (delegates to inv).

linalg.tensorsolve.name: linalg.tensorsolve
linalg.tensorsolve.notes: Tensor solve. Cost: $n^3$ after reshape (delegates to solve).

linalg.trace.name: linalg.trace
linalg.trace.notes: Matrix trace. Cost: n (sum of diagonal elements).

linalg.vector_norm.name: linalg.vector_norm
linalg.vector_norm.notes: Vector norm. Cost: numel (or 2*numel for general p-norm).

linspace.name: linspace
linspace.notes: Return evenly spaced numbers over interval. Cost: numel(output).

mask_indices.name: mask_indices
mask_indices.notes: Return indices of mask for n x n array. Cost: numel(output).

matrix_transpose.name: matrix_transpose
matrix_transpose.notes: Transpose last two dimensions (NumPy 2.x array API).

may_share_memory.name: may_share_memory
may_share_memory.notes: Determine if two arrays might share memory.

meshgrid.name: meshgrid
meshgrid.notes: Coordinate matrices from coordinate vectors. Cost: numel(output).

min_scalar_type.name: min_scalar_type
min_scalar_type.notes: Return the minimum scalar type for a value.

mintypecode.name: mintypecode
mintypecode.notes: Return minimum data type character that can satisfy all given types.

modf.name: modf
modf.notes: Return fractional and integral parts element-wise.

nan_to_num.name: nan_to_num
nan_to_num.notes: Replace NaN/inf with finite numbers element-wise.

ndim.name: ndim
ndim.notes: Return number of dimensions of array.

nextafter.name: nextafter
nextafter.notes: Return next float after x1 toward x2 element-wise.

nonzero.name: nonzero
nonzero.notes: Return indices of non-zero elements. Cost: numel(input).

ones_like.name: ones_like
ones_like.notes: Array of ones with same shape/type as input.

outer.name: outer
outer.notes: Outer product of two vectors; cost = M*N.

packbits.name: packbits
packbits.notes: Pack elements of array into bits. Cost: numel(input).

place.name: place
place.notes: Change elements satisfying condition. Cost: numel(input).

polyadd.name: polyadd
polyadd.notes: Add two polynomials. Cost: max(n1, n2) FLOPs.

polydiv.name: polydiv
polydiv.notes: Divide one polynomial by another. Cost: n1 * n2 FLOPs.

polyfit.name: polyfit
polyfit.notes: Least squares polynomial fit. Cost: 2 * m * (deg+1)^2 FLOPs.

polymul.name: polymul
polymul.notes: Multiply polynomials. Cost: n1 * n2 FLOPs.

polysub.name: polysub
polysub.notes: Difference (subtraction) of two polynomials. Cost: max(n1, n2) FLOPs.

polyval.name: polyval
polyval.notes: Evaluate polynomial at given points. Cost: $m \cdot \text{deg}$ (Horner's method, FMA=1).

positive.name: positive
positive.notes: Element-wise unary plus (copy with sign preserved).

promote_types.name: promote_types
promote_types.notes: Return smallest type to which both types may be safely cast.

put.name: put
put.notes: Replace elements at given flat indices. Cost: numel(input).

put_along_axis.name: put_along_axis
put_along_axis.notes: Put values into destination array using indices. Cost: numel(input).

putmask.name: putmask
putmask.notes: Change elements of array based on condition and input values. Cost: numel(input).

random.choice.name: random.choice
random.choice.notes: Sampling; cost = numel(output) if replace, n*ceil(log2(n)) if not.

random.default_rng.name: random.default_rng
random.default_rng.notes: Construct a new Generator with default BitGenerator.

random.get_state.name: random.get_state
random.get_state.notes: Return tuple representing internal state of generator.

ravel.name: ravel
ravel.notes: Return contiguous flattened array. Cost: numel(input).

ravel_multi_index.name: ravel_multi_index
ravel_multi_index.notes: Convert multi-dimensional index to flat index.

real.name: real
real.notes: Return real part of complex array.

real_if_close.name: real_if_close
real_if_close.notes: Return real array if imaginary part is negligible.

repeat.name: repeat
repeat.notes: Repeat elements of an array. Cost: numel(output).

resize.name: resize
resize.notes: Return new array with given shape by repeating. Cost: numel(output).

result_type.name: result_type
result_type.notes: Return type that results from applying NumPy type promotion.

roll.name: roll
roll.notes: Roll array elements along axis. Cost: numel(output).

rollaxis.name: rollaxis
rollaxis.notes: Roll specified axis backwards. Cost: numel(output).

roots.name: roots
roots.notes: Return roots of polynomial with given coefficients. Cost: $n^3$ (companion matrix eig, simplified).

select.name: select
select.notes: Return array from list of choices based on conditions. Cost: numel(input).

shares_memory.name: shares_memory
shares_memory.notes: Determine if two arrays share memory.

signbit.name: signbit
signbit.notes: Returns True for elements with negative sign bit.

size.name: size
size.notes: Return number of elements in array.

sort.name: sort
sort.notes: Comparison sort; cost = n*ceil(log2(n)) per slice.

spacing.name: spacing
spacing.notes: Return ULP spacing for each element.

split.name: split
split.notes: Split array into sub-arrays. Cost: numel(output).

stack.name: stack
stack.notes: Join arrays along new axis. Cost: numel(output).

swapaxes.name: swapaxes
swapaxes.notes: Interchange two axes of an array.

take.name: take
take.notes: Take elements from array along axis. Cost: numel(output).

take_along_axis.name: take_along_axis
take_along_axis.notes: Take values from input array by matching 1-D index. Cost: numel(output).

tensordot.cost_formula: product of contracted dims * output size
tensordot.name: tensordot
tensordot.notes: Tensor dot product along specified axes.

tile.name: tile
tile.notes: Repeat array by tiling. Cost: numel(output).

tri.name: tri
tri.notes: Array with ones at and below given diagonal.

tril_indices.name: tril_indices
tril_indices.notes: Return lower-triangle indices for n x n array.

tril_indices_from.name: tril_indices_from
tril_indices_from.notes: Return lower-triangle indices for given array.

trim_zeros.name: trim_zeros
trim_zeros.notes: Trim leading/trailing zeros from 1-D array. Cost: num trimmed.

triu_indices.name: triu_indices
triu_indices.notes: Return upper-triangle indices for n x n array.

triu_indices_from.name: triu_indices_from
triu_indices_from.notes: Return upper-triangle indices for given array.

typename.name: typename
typename.notes: Return description of given data type code.

unpackbits.name: unpackbits
unpackbits.notes: Unpack elements of array into bits. Cost: numel(input).

unravel_index.name: unravel_index
unravel_index.notes: Convert flat index to multi-dimensional index.

unstack.name: unstack
unstack.notes: Unstack array along axis into tuple of arrays (NumPy 2.x). Cost: numel(output).

vdot.name: vdot
vdot.notes: Dot product with conjugation; cost = N (FMA=1).

vecdot.name: vecdot
vecdot.notes: Vector dot product along last axis.

vsplit.name: vsplit
vsplit.notes: Split array into rows. Cost: numel(output).

where.name: where
where.notes: Select elements based on condition. Cost: numel(input).

zeros_like.name: zeros_like
zeros_like.notes: Array of zeros with same shape/type as input.
